news.headline: The Club's 10 things to watch in the stock market Friday
news.summary: Stocks are pointing to a lower open as the sell-off in chip stocks continues. Plus, Netflix delivers a disappointing quarter.

news.headline: Obscure volatility measure points to a 'Magnificent Seven’ earnings breakout
news.summary: If the S&P 500 is to make a new record, it may require the "Magnificent Seven" to get back into gear.

news.headline: Inside the Chinese fraud rings stealing billions from banks and retailers
news.summary: Chinese organized crime groups are making as much as $1 billion annually in tap-to-pay fraud schemes targeting retailers and banks.

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $697.79 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $746.53 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Bearish — favor puts / short delta.
Use QQQ $697.79 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: META PUT — enter $21.44–$23.70, target $33.86+, stop $13.54.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a softer open with QQQ -1.15% and SPY -0.56%. Composite sentiment -45 (Bearish). The tape is being driven mainly by qqq / mega-cap tech, vix, market breadth (a/d). VIX at 17.31 (+4.62%). Environment read: favor puts / short delta. Energy (+1.47%) is leading while Communication (-5.07%) lags. Premarket strength in XOM, LLY; weakness in NFLX, META. The desk's highest-conviction setup is META (6.8/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
